role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund invests under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in investments that provide exposure to the SPDR ® S&P 500 ® ETF Trust (the “Underlying ETF”). FLEX Options are exchange-traded option contracts with uniquely customizable terms. -null-. It is non-diversified.
